name: flow-diagram
title: Flow Diagram
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Animated architecture flow diagram with nodes connected by bezier-curved edges. Features draw-on animation, flowing particles, hover highlighting, dot grid background, and radial glow. All data-driven via props.
docs: Pass arrays of `nodes`, `edges`, and `positions` (percentage coordinates). Use `wideNodeId` to make one node wider. Set `live: true` on a node for a pulsing indicator. Edges support `optional` (dashed) and `bidirectional` (reverse particles).
